sanitized_advisory_excerpt.recovery_rationale: Merchant m001 reported a sold_out condition during demo-night-tour. This may impact visitor experience and available services. Organizer should assess venue capacity, adjust routing, and coordinate with affected merchant before continuing operations.
sanitized_advisory_excerpt.visitor_safe_notice_draft: One of the tour stops is currently at full capacity. Please follow organizer guidance for possible routing adjustments. We appreciate your patience while we ensure everyone has a smooth experience.
sanitized_advisory_excerpt.safety_notes: No immediate safety hazard detected. Organizer approval is required before any authoritative action such as rerouting visitors or updating capacity status.
